title: Deliciously Mustardy Egyptian Lamb Kebabs
description: A silky and flavorful Egyptian dish featuring lamb loin chops marinated in a mixture of mustard and spices, perfect for a hangover cure. This ovo-vegetarian-friendly recipe is a must-try for anyone looking for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together mustard, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the lamb pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated lamb pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
Offer a side of pita bread or rice to complete the meal.
